text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and T.M. Opera O finds herself in
a completely new situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Look at Meisho Doto! A second place finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's steadily built herself up from a no-name
newcomer to now proving herself capable of the
graded races!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... I... made it... somehow... I'm getting there, little by little.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, oh! Look at the TV, Trainer! It's Doto! Our Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Any moment now, I guarantee she'll come through
that door to thank me for all I've done to spur her
growth!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: OPERA OOOOO!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did I say? Now, Doto, shower me with
grateful adoration!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I do feel grateful, but there's something
more important right now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A press conference is about to start... Special
Week, Grass Wonder, and El Condor Pasa are all
there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? The older generation's three musketeers
are speaking to the press?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, everybody! We have
something important to say!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The three of us, myself, Grass Wonder, and El
Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...won't be running in next year's Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Does that mean you're bowing out after this year?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, we feel we have accomplished all we can at
this level and wish to compete in the Dream
Trophy League.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ciao, everybody! Wait, is this goodbye?! Will we
ever see each other again?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, we aren't quitting. Don't give them the wrong
idea.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So, three stalwarts of the Twinkle Series are
moving on to the next league.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What does this mean for next year? I hope it
doesn't start a downward spiral...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Kgh! Argh, grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can those three be advancing to the next
stage? Ahh, that's not even their most
unforgivable transgression...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They've stolen my spotlight! Even though we're all
seniors!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My kingdom is in ruins... I must reclaim my seat as
the main actor.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, start preparations immediately. I'll be
having a press conference of my own!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What about? Ha ha ha! Did you expect me to
know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I'll be figuring that out right now, of course.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? But if we don't have an idea... Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reluctantly, I schedule a press conference for
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all adoring fans of Umamusume!
Honorable members of the press! You have
recently been made aware of the departure of
three certain persons.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But a year remains until then. New royalty must
therefore be crowned in the interim.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So, who will inherit their throne? Who, I say?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to provide the answer! It will be none
other than me, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I am the Overlord! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's logic doesn't add up, but her
overwhelming enthusiasm holds everyone's
attention.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear, here and now, that over the next year I
will build a track record befitting the ruler of the
next age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and the Arima
Kinen—I shall conquer every G1 race and build
my dynasty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The chaotic age of vying competitors is at an end.
A singular king shall unite the realm under one
throne.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the curtain has risen to reveal my reign! This
is no sunset, but the dawn of an era!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Witness the birth of a new ruler!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her bold declaration is met with oohs and aahs
from the audience. After entering her senior year,
it seems her skills in stage performance have
improved too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is... amazing. I mean, she could cheer up
Ayabe before, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Now she's even more amazing... She made everyone go "wow"... Uuungh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I wish she'd see me as someone to compete with.
I've grown stronger too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the courage though... I can't tell her,
I just can't...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, once I have successfully taken my place at
the top...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series will know peace as a
flourishing kingdom for a millennium to come!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So you see, the three heroes bidding farewell are
already irrelevant.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Usher them out the door with a goodbye and
adieu! Aaaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Someone here's lookin' for trouble, huh? Well,
she's definitely found it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, so long as we're around, we can't let her
win!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, yes. She'll soon realize who she's really
up against.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, I've got some trainin' to do! Nos vemos!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It seems El hasn't realized yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I understand the real reason you held this press
conference, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though you might not have been aware of it
yourself, it was for the sake of the disheartened
fans.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But thank you. I'm glad the younger generation
has you among their ranks.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, my declaration is complete, Trainer! The
starring role is mine once again.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have crossed the Rubicon! All that remains is to
run my way to becoming the Centurial Overlord
by the end of this year! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sudden announcement from three popular
Umamusume threatened to take the wind out of
the Twinkle Series' sails...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But T.M. Opera O's declaration instantly
breathed new life into them. A year of
pulse-pounding races between the generations
await!
